events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need decide fail because spool installed backwards vs isometric flow arrow. Need risk? Could be medium/high depending on process. Industrial piping, flow direction matters for check valves, control valves, strainers, etc. Backwards installation is non-compliant with drawings/specs. Could cause operational issues, damage, safety. Risk likely high? Let's assess. Spool installed backwards vs flow arrow on iso. At rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value not asked 0. Sound etc default. Findings: spool orientation reversed relative to isometric flow arrow. Actions: remove/reposition spool to match drawing, re-inspect, update as-built. Rationale: ASME B31.3 requires piping be erected in accordance with design drawings; flow direction must match iso; reversed spool can impair function/safety. References: ASME B31.3, project iso drawings. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside.
